description: A C library for interacting with OpenAI-compatible, Google Gemini, and Anthropic Claude LLM APIs, supporting text and multimodal inputs, and both regular and streaming responses.

architecture.description: Modular architecture with focused source files for improved maintainability

sourceFiles.name: disasterparty.c
sourceFiles.description: Main library entry point and version information

dataTypes.name: dp_provider_type_t
dataTypes.description: Enumeration for supported LLM API providers.

dataTypes.name: dp_feature_t
dataTypes.description: Advanced feature flags that can be enabled.

values.name: DP_FEATURE_THINKING
values.description: Enable internal reasoning / thinking tokens support.

dataTypes.name: dp_message_role_t
dataTypes.description: Enumeration for the role in a message.

dataTypes.name: dp_content_part_type_t
dataTypes.description: Enumeration for the type of content part in a multimodal message.

dataTypes.name: dp_content_part_t
dataTypes.description: Represents a single part of a multimodal message content.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of this content part.

fields.name: text
fields.description: Text content (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_TEXT).

fields.name: image_url
fields.description: URL of the image (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_IMAGE_URL).

fields.name: image_base64
fields.description: Base64 encoded image data (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_IMAGE_BASE64).

fields.name: file_data
fields.type: struct { char* mime_type; char* data; char* filename; }
fields.description: Base64 encoded file data (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_FILE_DATA).

fields.name: file_reference
fields.description: Reference to an uploaded file (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_FILE_REFERENCE).

fields.name: tool_call
fields.type: struct { char* id; char* function_name; char* arguments_json; }
fields.description: Tool call details (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_TOOL_CALL).

fields.name: tool_result
fields.type: struct { char* tool_call_id; char* content; bool is_error; }
fields.description: Tool result details (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_TOOL_RESULT).

fields.name: thinking
fields.description: Thinking/reasoning content (if type is DP_CONTENT_PART_THINKING).

dataTypes.name: dp_message_t
dataTypes.description: Represents a single message in a conversation.

fields.name: role
fields.description: Role of the message sender.

fields.name: parts
fields.description: Array of content parts for multimodality.

fields.name: num_parts
fields.description: Number of parts in the 'parts' array.

dataTypes.name: dp_request_config_t
dataTypes.description: Configuration for an LLM API request.

fields.name: model
fields.description: Identifier of the model to use.

fields.name: messages
fields.description: Array of messages forming the conversation history.

fields.name: num_messages
fields.description: Number of messages in the 'messages' array.

fields.name: system_prompt
fields.description: Optional system prompt.

fields.name: temperature
fields.description: Sampling temperature for generation.

fields.name: max_tokens
fields.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

fields.name: stream
fields.description: True for streaming response.

fields.name: top_p
fields.description: Nucleus sampling parameter.

fields.name: top_k
fields.description: Top-k sampling parameter.

fields.name: stop_sequences
fields.description: Array of stop sequences.

fields.name: num_stop_sequences
fields.description: Number of stop sequences.

fields.name: thinking
fields.description: Thinking configuration for models that support it.

fields.name: reasoning_effort
fields.description: OpenAI-specific reasoning effort (low, medium, high).

dataTypes.name: dp_response_t
dataTypes.description: Represents the overall response from an LLM API call.

fields.name: parts
fields.description: Array of response parts.

fields.name: num_parts
fields.description: Number of parts in the 'parts' array.

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Error message if the operation failed.

fields.name: http_status_code
fields.description: HTTP status code of the API call.

fields.name: finish_reason
fields.description: Reason the generation finished.

dataTypes.name: dp_anthropic_event_type_t
dataTypes.description: Enumeration for detailed stream event types.

dataTypes.name: dp_stream_event_t
dataTypes.description: Structure to hold a detailed stream event.

fields.name: event_type
fields.description: The type of the SSE event.

fields.name: raw_json_data
fields.description: The raw JSON or text data of the event.

functions.name: dp_enable_advanced_features
functions.description: Enables advanced features for the context using a variable number of features, terminated by 0.

functions.name: dp_perform_detailed_streaming_completion
functions.description: Performs a streaming completion request, providing detailed events to the callback across all providers.
